conditions.description: Lower bound for the size of a sumset.
conditions.name: Kneser's theorem

conditions.description: Consecutive primes in arithmetic progressions (bounded gaps).
conditions.name: Maynard–Tao theorem

conditions.description: Rank-of-relations bound for finitely presented groups/algebras.
conditions.name: Golod–Shafarevich inequality

conditions.description: Least prime in an arithmetic progression.
conditions.name: Linnik's theorem

conditions.description: Strings of consecutive primes in a progression.
conditions.name: Shiu's theorem

conditions.description: Bound on the number of prime factors of nearby integers.
conditions.name: Tao–Teräväinen theorem

conditions.description: The proof trusts a native-compiled computation, not a kernel proof.
conditions.name: native_decide (trusted native evaluation)
